steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The question asks to emphasize a similarity between the two sculptures. This means the correct answer must highlight what both works share, not what distinguishes them.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content: A directly asserts that both Uras Horse and Golden Connection are LED light sculptures made by Grimanesa Amoros, establishing their shared characteristic. B explicitly contrasts the two works, C only discusses one sculpture, and D emphasizes their size difference. That matches choice A — A is correct.
